combined_text: Does polio still exist? Is it curable? Does polio still exist? Is it curable? Updated March 2018Q: Polio is a disease you read about in history books. Does it still exist? Is it curable? A: Polio does still exist, although polio cases have decreased by over 99% since 1988, from an estimated more than 350 000 cases to 22 reported cases in
